title: Why Bonjourr for Safari is leaving the App Store
description: The App Store version of Bonjourr is being discontinued due to high maintenance costs and low usage. Here’s what this means for current users and what comes next.

title: Bonjourr 22: pomodoro timer, new look, right click menu & (much) more!
description: Bonjourr 22 introduces a Pomodoro timer, new UI, and a full right-click experience overhaul.

title: Bonjourr 21: the background update 🖼️
description: Bonjourr 21 overhauls backgrounds with new customization tools and improved visual flexibility.

title: After weeks of work, our overhauled docs are here!
description: We’ve completely revamped our documentation with a new design, better navigation, helpful guides, and fresh content.
